ExtensionEntityPropertyAddition.description: Additional properties to append to an extension entity. Entity id is the extension's local entity id (e.g. Employee). At merge time these properties are appended to the namespaced entity.

entityId.description: Extension entity id (e.g. Employee). Must exist in the extension.

properties.description: Property definitions to add to this entity.

ExtensionPageOverride.description: Override or extend an extension page. Page id is the extension's local page id. Only listed properties are applied; at merge time they are merged with the extension page (e.g. fieldOverrides appended, listConfig merged or replaced per platform rules).

pageId.description: Extension page id (e.g. EmployeeEdit). Must exist in the extension.

fieldOverrides.description: Additional or overriding field overrides for this page.

listConfig.description: List config override for list pages (columns, filterFields, quickSearchFields, defaultSort, pageSize).

ExtensionReferenceOverrides.description: Optional overrides applied when merging this extension. All properties are explicit; no additionalProperties.

entityPropertyAdditions.description: Additional properties to add to extension entities (e.g. height, weight on Employee).

ExtensionReference.description: Reference to an extension from the extension catalog. Resolved at load time; resolved extension content is merged into the effective application definition with namespacing (extensionId.id). Optional overrides extend or override extension entities and pages.

extensionId.description: Extension identifier (e.g. employee, hunting). Must match the extension's id.

source.description: Optional URL, file path, or registry key to resolve the extension JSON. If omitted, resolution uses the extension catalog/registry keyed by extensionId and version.

overrides.description: Optional entity and page overrides (e.g. add properties to extension entities, override page fieldOverrides or listConfig).
